clinical_recommendation.action: Significantly lower starting dose, frequent INR monitoring
clinical_recommendation.cpic_guideline: Use lower starting dose and reduce maintenance dose due to poor metabolism
clinical_recommendation.monitoring: Frequent INR monitoring recommended; consider alternative anticoagulant therapy

llm_generated_explanation.summary: Patient with CYP2C9 poor metabolizer phenotype from *2/*3 diplotype. Warfarin metabolism is significantly reduced, creating an accumulation risk.
llm_generated_explanation.biological_mechanism: The CYP2C9 *2 and *3 alleles encode enzymes with reduced catalytic activity. Both alleles produce substantially diminished warfarin metabolism, leading to prolonged drug effect and increased bleeding risk.
